privileged_info_summary: All five metadata claims are verified correct. The task operates on a synthetic Node.js Todo application created fresh by setup_task.sh (inspired by Docker's official getting-started app, but not downloaded). The application runs on port 3000 and is located at /home/ga/todo-app. The original single-stage Docker image is tagged 'todo-app:original' and the optimized multi-stage image must be tagged 'todo-app:optimized' with size < 250 MB. The verifier checks for at least 2 FROM statements, image existence, size threshold, 50% size reduction, and HTTP functionality via container execution.
